smoke.notes: Model loaded successfully on L4 GPU. 22050 Hz sample rate. 6 language tags available.

quality.notes: All 4 test sentences generated successfully. Default speaker used (no language tag specified in quality/perf calls, model falls back to random). RTF consistently ~0.8 across all sentence lengths. Numbers and dates handled correctly. Long text (300 chars) generated ~30s of audio without degradation.

performance.notes: Median RTF=0.807 on L4 GPU (slower than claimed 0.2 on RTX 5080). RTF range: 0.79-0.87. Not real-time on L4 but close.
